title: Brand entity
description: A brand record (DATA-11). In v1 brands are identifiers and filtered lists only, so this schema is deliberately minimal. Metadata fields (id, slug, name) are plain scalars. Any fact-bearing field reuses the SourcedValue envelope by $ref (DATA-09). Verification and publication status are reserved for the Phase 2 gate.

name.description: Brand display name. Used as an identifier; a brand name is not an image and is not gated by image.schema.json.

manufacturer.description: Optional fact-bearing: the owning manufacturer or parent company, sourced.

verificationStatus.description: Derived-only entity status (D-03/R-06): computed from the entity's facts every build, so any author-set value is rejected by Ajv. Only null validates.

publicationStatus.description: Derived-only entity status (D-03/R-06): computed from the entity's facts every build, so any author-set value is rejected by Ajv. Only null validates.
